title: Attach
text: Attach This property determines the border to which the split bar remains attached when the form is resized; the split bar keeps its position constant with respect to the indicated border. Valid values are Left or Right for vertical split bars, and Top or Bottom for horizontal split bars. Value Description Left Vertical split bar is attached to left border. Right Vertical split bar is attached to right border. Top Horizontal split bar is attached to top border. Bottom Horizontal split bar is attached to bottom border. Applies To Split Bars Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
